matchingDescription: Cloud storage and file sync service, online backup, file sharing and collaboration, Dropbox

variants.text: Dropbox keeps your files synced across every device automatically — access, edit, and share your documents from anywhere, on any device.
Share files and collaborate in real time with Dropbox — works with Slack, Zoom, and Google Workspace so your team stays in sync without the email chain.
Back up your important files securely with Dropbox — 256-bit AES encryption keeps your documents safe, with version history to recover any file.
Share large files instantly with Dropbox — create a shareable link in seconds, with no size limit on transfers and full control over who can view or edit.
Dropbox gives you instant access to all your files from any device, anywhere — so you can work from home, the office, or on the go without missing a beat.
